## Checklist

- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Type check passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No breaking changes introduced
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
